languages.text: The Krieg soldiers wear gas masks and are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g}. While in trenches, a Krieg soldier gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. When a Krieg soldier dies, it grants {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}salvation in death{/g} to the rest of the Krieg soldiers.
languages.original_text:
Криговцы носят противогазы.
Имеют иммун к токсину.
При смерти накладывают на выживших товарищей {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}Salvation in Death{/g}.
В окопах имеют +20 WP

traits.locale_text: The Krieg soldiers have the gas masks on and are immune to toxins. While in trenches, a Krieg soldier has +20 Willpower. When a Krieg soldier dies, it grants {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}Salvation in Death{/g} to the rest of the Krieg soldiers.

The Krieg soldiers wear gas masks and are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g}. While in trenches, a Krieg soldier gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. When a Krieg soldier dies, it grants {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}salvation in death{/g} to the rest of the Krieg soldiers.

languages.text: Криговские солдаты носят противогазы и невосприимчивы к {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}токсичному урону{/g}. В окопах криговский солдат получает +20 к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Воле{/g}. Когда такой солдат погибает, он дает +1 уровень {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}искупления в смерти{/g} остальным криговским солдатам.

When a Krieg soldier dies, it grants {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}salvation in death{/g} to the rest of the Krieg soldiers.

languages.text: Die Krieg-Soldaten tragen Gasmasken und sind immun gegen {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}Giftschaden{/g}. In Schützengräben erhalten Krieg-Soldaten +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willenskraft{/g}. Stirbt ein Krieg-Soldat, gewährt er den übrigen Krieg-Soldaten {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}Erlösung im Tod{/g}.

When a Krieg soldier dies, it grants {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}salvation in death{/g} to the rest of the Krieg soldiers.

traits.locale_text: Die Krieg-Soldaten tragen Gasmasken und sind immun gegen {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}Giftschaden{/g}. languages.text: Los soldados de Krieg llevan máscaras de gas y son inmunes al {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}daño tóxico{/g}. En las trincheras, los soldados de Krieg obtienen +20 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Voluntad{/g}. Cuando un soldado de Krieg muere, otorga {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}salvación en la muerte{/g} al resto de soldados de Krieg.

While in trenches, a Krieg soldier gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. When a Krieg soldier dies, it grants {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}salvation in death{/g} to the rest of the Krieg soldiers.

traits.locale_text: Los soldados de Krieg llevan máscaras de gas y son inmunes al {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}daño tóxico{/g}. En las trincheras, los soldados de Krieg obtienen +20 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Voluntad{/g}. Cuando un soldado de Krieg muere, otorga {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}salvación en la muerte{/g} al resto de soldados de Krieg.

languages.text: Krieg askerleri, gaz maskesi takar ve {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toksik hasarına{/g} karşı bağışıktır. Bir Krieg askeri, hendekteyken +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} niteliği kazanır. Bir Krieg askeri, öldüğünde diğer Krieg askerlerine {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}ölümde kurtuluş{/g} kazandırır.
languages.original_text: The Krieg soldiers wear gas masks and are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g}. While in trenches, a Krieg soldier gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. When a Krieg soldier dies, it grants {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}salvation in death{/g} to the rest of the Krieg soldiers.

traits.locale_text: Krieg askerleri, gaz maskesi takar ve {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toksik hasarına{/g} karşı bağışıktır. Bir Krieg askeri, hendekteyken +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}İrade{/g} niteliği kazanır. Bir Krieg askeri, öldüğünde diğer Krieg askerlerine {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}ölümde kurtuluş{/g} kazandırır.

languages.text: 克里格士兵佩戴防毒面具且免疫{g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}毒素伤害{/g}。在战壕中时，克里格士兵获得20点{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}。当克里格士兵阵亡时，会赋予剩余的克里格士兵{g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}死亡救赎{/g}效果。
languages.original_text: The Krieg soldiers wear gas masks and are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g}. While in trenches, a Krieg soldier gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. When a Krieg soldier dies, it grants {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}salvation in death{/g} to the rest of the Krieg soldiers.

traits.locale_text: 克里格士兵佩戴防毒面具且免疫{g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}毒素伤害{/g}。在战壕中时，克里格士兵获得20点{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志{/g}。当克里格士兵阵亡时，会赋予剩余的克里格士兵{g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}死亡救赎{/g}效果。

languages.text: Les soldats de Krieg portent des masques à gaz et sont insensibles aux {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}dégâts toxiques{/g}. Un soldat de Krieg dans une tranchée gagne +20 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Force mentale{/g}. À sa mort, le soldat de Krieg confère {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}Salut dans la mort{/g} aux autres soldats de Krieg.
languages.original_text: The Krieg soldiers wear gas masks and are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g}. While in trenches, a Krieg soldier gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. When a Krieg soldier dies, it grants {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}salvation in death{/g} to the rest of the Krieg soldiers.

traits.locale_text: Les soldats de Krieg portent des masques à gaz et sont insensibles aux {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}dégâts toxiques{/g}. Un soldat de Krieg dans une tranchée gagne +20 de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Force mentale{/g}. À sa mort, le soldat de Krieg confère {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}Salut dans la mort{/g} aux autres soldats de Krieg.

languages.text: クリーグの兵士はガスマスクを着用しており、{g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}毒ダメージ{/g}に耐性がある。塹壕にいる間は、クリーグの兵士は+20の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志力{/g}を得る。クリーグの兵士が死亡すると、他のクリーグの兵士に{g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}死後の救済{/g}を与える。
languages.original_text: The Krieg soldiers wear gas masks and are immune to {g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}toxic damage{/g}. While in trenches, a Krieg soldier gains +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}Willpower{/g}. When a Krieg soldier dies, it grants {g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}salvation in death{/g} to the rest of the Krieg soldiers.

traits.locale_text: クリーグの兵士はガスマスクを着用しており、{g|Encyclopedia:ToxicDamage}毒ダメージ{/g}に耐性がある。塹壕にいる間は、クリーグの兵士は+20の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerWillpower}意志力{/g}を得る。クリーグの兵士が死亡すると、他のクリーグの兵士に{g|f:bad8e3de64654eedab9cbb4091144758}死後の救済{/g}を与える。
